title: Webhook
description: A persistent webhook subscription that delivers signed HTTP POST callbacks to an operator-controlled endpoint when specified identity lifecycle events occur. Managed via /v1/organizations/{org_id}/webhooks.

endpoint_url.description: HTTPS endpoint that will receive webhook POST requests. HTTP endpoints MUST be rejected.

items.description: Event type filter. Use '*' to subscribe to all events, or specific dot-notation event types (e.g. 'credential.issued', 'application.approved').

events.description: Event types this webhook subscription is active for. See standard event types in protocol/notification-target/SPECIFICATION.md for allowed values.

signing_secret.description: Shared secret used to compute the HMAC-SHA256 signature in X-MIP-Signature. Only returned on creation; subsequent reads return a masked value (e.g. 'sk_whsec_***abc123').

signing_secret_masked.description: Masked representation of the signing secret for display purposes. Full secret is only available on creation response.

api_version.description: API version to use when serialising event payloads. Format: YYYY-MM-DD. Defaults to the version current at creation time.

filter.description: Optional fine-grained event filter. Events matching the subscription event types are only delivered if they also satisfy these filter conditions.

flow_ids.description: Only deliver events related to these specific flows

credential_template_ids.description: Only deliver events related to credentials from these templates

timeout_seconds.description: Seconds to wait for endpoint acknowledgement (HTTP 2xx)

max_retries.description: Maximum delivery retry attempts on 5xx or timeout

retry_backoff_seconds.description: Per-retry wait times in seconds. Array length must equal max_retries.

status.description: ACTIVE: delivering. PAUSED: temporarily suspended. DISABLED_PERMANENTLY: too many consecutive failures — operator must re-enable explicitly.

failure_count.description: Consecutive delivery failures since last success. Automatically reset on a successful delivery.

$comment: Security: signing_secret MUST be generated by the server with at least 32 bytes of CSPRNG entropy. It MUST be stored hashed (HMAC-SHA256). The raw value MUST be returned only once, in the creation response.
